desc: When Twolegs destroy SkyClan's home, leader Cloudstar fights to save his Clan from being driven out of the forest.
descZh: 当两脚兽毁掉天族（SkyClan）的家园时，族长云星（Cloudstar）奋力阻止天族被赶出森林。

q.en: What is Cloudstar's position at the start of the story?
q.zh: 故事开始时，云星担任什么职务？

options.en: A RiverClan medicine cat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一名河族巫医（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The leader of SkyClan, the fifth Clan
options.zh: 天族（第五个族群）的族长

explain.en: Cloudstar is the proud leader of SkyClan, the fifth Clan that lived in the forest alongside the other four.
explain.zh: 云星是天族的骄傲族长，天族是与另外四族并存的第五个族群。

q.zh: 是什么毁掉了天族的森林领地？

options.zh: 两脚兽和他们的怪物（机械）

options.en: A fire started by lightning according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 闪电引发的大火（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Twolegs cut down the trees and built nests on SkyClan's land, leaving the Clan with no home.
explain.zh: 两脚兽砍倒树木、在领地上盖巢穴，让天族无家可归。

q.en: To save his Clan, what does Cloudstar ask of the other Clan leaders?
q.zh: 为了拯救族群，云星向其他族长提出什么请求？

options.en: To make him leader of all the Clans according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 让他做所有族群的族长（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To fight the Twolegs for him
To share some of their territory with SkyClan
options.zh: 分出一部分领地给天族

explain.en: At a Gathering, Cloudstar begs the other leaders to let SkyClan live in part of their territory.
explain.zh: 在一次族聚上，云星恳求其他族长让天族在他们的领地中栖身。

q.en: How do the other four Clan leaders respond to Cloudstar's plea?
q.zh: 其他四位族长如何回应云星的恳求？

options.en: They each refuse, and Redstar tells SkyClan to leave the forest
options.zh: 他们全都拒绝，红星（Redstar）叫天族离开森林

options.en: They happily share their territory according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们高兴地分出了领地（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Every leader gives an excuse to refuse, and Redstar of ThunderClan tells SkyClan to leave the forest.
explain.zh: 每位族长都找借口拒绝，雷族的红星更叫天族离开森林。

options.en: Maplestar according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 枫星（Maplestar）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Birdflight is Cloudstar's mate and a queen of SkyClan, expecting his kits.
explain.zh: 鸟飞是云星的伴侣，也是天族的 queen，正怀着他的孩子。

q.en: Why does Birdflight NOT leave the forest with the rest of SkyClan?
q.zh: 鸟飞为什么没有随天族其他成员离开森林？

options.en: Her newborn kits are too young to travel, so she stays in ThunderClan
options.zh: 她刚出生的孩子太小无法远行，于是留在雷族

options.en: She is afraid of the journey
She wants to live as a rogue according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 她想当流浪猫（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Because her kits are tiny, Birdflight accepts the ThunderClan medicine cat's offer to raise them there.
explain.zh: 因为孩子还很小，鸟飞接受了雷族巫医的收留，让他们在雷族长大。

q.en: Which ThunderClan medicine cat offers Birdflight and her kits a home?
q.zh: 是哪只雷族巫医收留了鸟飞和她的孩子？

options.en: Cinderpelt according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 炭皮（Cinderpelt）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Kestrelwing, the ThunderClan medicine cat, promises Birdflight and her kits a place in his Clan.
explain.zh: 雷族巫医雀翅承诺让鸟飞和孩子们留在雷族。

q.en: What vow does Cloudstar make after SkyClan is driven out?
q.zh: 天族被赶走后，云星立下了什么誓言？

options.en: To destroy the other Clans according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 要毁灭其他族群（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: That SkyClan will never look to the stars (StarClan) again

explain.en: Feeling betrayed by StarClan and the other Clans, Cloudstar swears SkyClan will never seek the stars again.
explain.zh: 云星觉得被星族和其他族群背叛，发誓天族再也不仰望星空。

q.en: What are the names of Cloudstar and Birdflight's kits?
q.zh: 云星和鸟飞的孩子叫什么名字？

options.en: Thunderkit and Stormkit according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 雷崽（Thunderkit）和暴崽（Stormkit）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Their two kits are Spottedkit and Gorsekit, who grow up in ThunderClan after Birdflight stays behind.
explain.zh: 他们的两个孩子斑崽和荆棘崽随母亲留在雷族长大。

q.en: Who later brings SkyClan back and rebuilds the lost Clan?
q.zh: 后来是谁让天族重生、重建了这个消失的族群？

explain.en: Many generations later, Firestar travels to the gorge and rebuilds SkyClan, fulfilling Cloudstar's hope.
explain.zh: 许多代之后，火星远赴峡谷重建天族，实现了云星的心愿。
